companyResearch.additionalContext: Rakuten Kobo Inc. is the world’s only dedicated digital bookseller. Owned by Tokyo-based Rakuten and headquartered in Toronto, Kobo enables more than 30 million readers worldwide to read anytime, anywhere and on any device. Founded in 2009, Kobo's products include e-books, e-readers, audiobooks, tablet computers, and reading applications.
